assertions.text: Uses 'claudit highlight path createScimGroup validateGroup save --project-dir ...' correctly
assertions.evidence: Agent did manual source analysis and never ran any highlight command.

assertions.text: Does NOT use wrong syntax like 'claudit highlight --path' or omit --project-dir
assertions.evidence: No highlight command attempted at all.

assertions.text: Produces or describes output in the Results Format with color-annotated spans
assertions.evidence: Agent produced a text description of where the functions are, but no JSON Results Format output, no color annotations, no span data.
